TraitDef.description: This pawn is naturally resistant to the sickness spread by diseased zombies and their blood.

li.label: zombie-plague immune
li.description: This pawn cannot catch the sickness spread by sick zombies or their blood.

TraitDef.description: This pawn instinctively goes for the head in combat and tries to put enemies down with precise cranial strikes.

li.label: head hunter
li.description: This pawn always aims for the head in combat when the target has one.

TraitDef.description: This pawn carries a corpse-like scent and presence that leaves zombies strangely uninterested.

li.label: dead scent
li.description: Zombies do not treat this pawn as hostile and usually ignore them unless caught in collateral damage.

TraitDef.description: This pawn is unnaturally resilient in a zombie outbreak and is much harder to put down.

li.label: hard to kill
li.description: This pawn takes less damage from zombies, is harder to pain-shock, and is less likely to catch zombie sickness.

TraitDef.description: This pawn keeps calm under pressure and can put accurate ranged fire into the undead.

li.label: steady hands
li.description: This pawn shoots more accurately and deals more ranged damage to zombies.

TraitDef.description: This pawn has a survival instinct for slipping away before the dead can drag them down.

li.label: quick escape
li.description: This pawn moves faster, dodges better in close combat, and tries to break away when zombies hit them.

TraitDef.description: This pawn carries a corpse-like scent and presence that leaves zombies strangely uninterested.

li.label: dead scent
li.description: Zombies do not treat this pawn as hostile and usually ignore them unless caught in collateral damage.
